##RRUFFID=R060862
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CaZn_2_(AsO_4_)_2_·2H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Mapimi, Durango, Mexico
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Dark reddish brown bladed crystals, crystal structure is reported by Yang et al (2012)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060862
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_0.99_(Zn_1.01_Mn^+3^_0.85_)(As_1.03_O_4_)_2_·[(OH)_0.85_ (H_2_O)_1.17_] ; (Total low,  mineral unstable under electron beam, blades are lotharmeyerite, botryoidal material is Mn oxide?)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
